title: Graaff-Reinet football developed one kit at a time
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The ever-generous Shoprite Graaff-Reinet and its manager, Felicia Ludick, recently sponsored some soccer kits to the Camdeboo Football Academy in a bid to advance football development in the area.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The ever-generous Shoprite Graaff-Reinet and its manager, Felicia Ludick, recently sponsored some soccer kits to the Camdeboo Football Academy in a bid to advance football development in the area."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“The football kits can now also be used by our girls soccer team that is going play in a league in Cradock, Somerset and Cookhouse."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This sponsorship will help us a lot,” said the club’s manager, Dan Memese.","html":"This sponsorship will help us a lot,” said the club’s manager, Dan Memese."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ludick said she wants to see football developed in the area and prosper, and that she is fascinated to see how the kids spend most of their time playing it.","html":"Ludick said she wants to see football developed in the area and prosper, and that she is fascinated to see how the kids spend most of their time playing it."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Graaff-Reinet football developed one kit at a time
